verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: Alif, Lam, Ra. These are the verses of the Book and a clear Qur'an.
verse.verse_2: Perhaps those who disbelieve will wish that they had been Muslims.
verse.verse_3: Let them eat and enjoy themselves and be diverted by [false] hope, for they are going to know.
verse.verse_4: And We did not destroy any city but that for it was a known decree.
verse.verse_5: No nation will precede its term, nor will they remain thereafter.
verse.verse_6: And they say, "O you upon whom the message has been sent down, indeed you are mad.
verse.verse_7: Why do you not bring us the angels, if you should be among the truthful?"
verse.verse_8: We do not send down the angels except with truth; and the disbelievers would not then be reprieved.
verse.verse_9: Indeed, it is We who sent down the Qur'an and indeed, We will be its guardian.
verse.verse_10: And We had certainly sent [messengers] before you, [O Muhammad], among the sects of the former peoples.
verse.verse_11: And no messenger would come to them except that they ridiculed him.
verse.verse_12: Thus do We insert denial into the hearts of the criminals.
verse.verse_13: They will not believe in it, while there has already occurred the precedent of the former peoples.
verse.verse_14: And [even] if We opened to them a gate from the heaven and they continued therein to ascend,
verse.verse_15: They would say, "Our eyes have only been dazzled. Rather, we are a people affected by magic."
verse.verse_16: And We have placed within the heaven great stars and have beautified it for the observers.
verse.verse_17: And We have protected it from every devil expelled [from the mercy of Allah]
verse.verse_18: Except one who steals a hearing and is pursued by a clear burning flame.
verse.verse_19: And the earth - We have spread it and cast therein firmly set mountains and caused to grow therein [something] of every well-balanced thing.
verse.verse_20: And We have made for you therein means of living and [for] those for whom you are not providers.
verse.verse_21: And there is not a thing but that with Us are its depositories, and We do not send it down except according to a known measure.
verse.verse_22: And We have sent the fertilizing winds and sent down water from the sky and given you drink from it. And you are not its retainers.
verse.verse_23: And indeed, it is We who give life and cause death, and We are the Inheritor.
verse.verse_24: And We have already known the preceding [generations] among you, and We have already known the later [ones to come].
verse.verse_25: And indeed, your Lord will gather them; indeed, He is Wise and Knowing.
verse.verse_26: And We did certainly create man out of clay from an altered black mud.
verse.verse_27: And the jinn We created before from scorching fire.
verse.verse_28: And [mention, O Muhammad], when your Lord said to the angels, "I will create a human being out of clay from an altered black mud.
verse.verse_29: And when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My [created] soul, then fall down to him in prostration."
verse.verse_30: So the angels prostrated - all of them entirely,
verse.verse_31: Except Iblees, he refused to be with those who prostrated.
verse.verse_32: [Allah] said, O Iblees, what is [the matter] with you that you are not with those who prostrate?"
verse.verse_33: He said, "Never would I prostrate to a human whom You created out of clay from an altered black mud."
verse.verse_34: [Allah] said, "Then get out of it, for indeed, you are expelled.
verse.verse_35: And indeed, upon you is the curse until the Day of Recompense."
verse.verse_36: He said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."
verse.verse_37: [Allah] said, "So indeed, you are of those reprieved
verse.verse_38: Until the Day of the time well-known."
verse.verse_39: [Iblees] said, "My Lord, because You have put me in error, I will surely make [disobedience] attractive to them on earth, and I will mislead them all
verse.verse_40: Except, among them, Your chosen servants."
verse.verse_41: [Allah] said, "This is a path [of return] to Me [that is] straight.
verse.verse_42: Indeed, My servants - no authority will you have over them, except those who follow you of the deviators.
verse.verse_43: And indeed, Hell is the promised place for them all.
verse.verse_44: It has seven gates; for every gate is of them a portion designated."
verse.verse_45: Indeed, the righteous will be within gardens and springs.
verse.verse_46: [Having been told], "Enter it in peace, safe [and secure]."
verse.verse_47: And We will remove whatever is in their breasts of resentment, [so they will be] brothers, on thrones facing each other.
verse.verse_48: No fatigue will touch them therein, nor from it will they [ever] be removed.
verse.verse_49: [O Muhammad], inform My servants that it is I who am the Forgiving, the Merciful.
verse.verse_50: And that it is My punishment which is the painful punishment.
verse.verse_51: And inform them about the guests of Abraham,
verse.verse_52: When they entered upon him and said, "Peace." [Abraham] said, "Indeed, we are fearful of you."
verse.verse_53: [The angels] said, "Fear not. Indeed, we give you good tidings of a learned boy."
verse.verse_54: He said, "Have you given me good tidings although old age has come upon me? Then of what [wonder] do you inform?"
verse.verse_55: They said, "We have given you good tidings in truth, so do not be of the despairing."
verse.verse_56: He said, "And who despairs of the mercy of his Lord except for those astray?"
verse.verse_57: [Abraham] said, "Then what is your business [here], O messengers?"
verse.verse_58: They said, "Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals,
verse.verse_59: Except the family of Lot; indeed, we will save them all
verse.verse_60: Except his wife." Allah decreed that she is of those who remain behind.
verse.verse_61: And when the messengers came to the family of Lot,
verse.verse_62: He said, "Indeed, you are people unknown."
verse.verse_63: They said, "But we have come to you with that about which they were disputing,
verse.verse_64: And we have come to you with truth, and indeed, we are truthful.
verse.verse_65: So set out with your family during a portion of the night and follow behind them and let not anyone among you look back and continue on to where you are commanded."
verse.verse_66: And We conveyed to him [the decree] of that matter: that those [sinners] would be eliminated by early morning.
verse.verse_67: And the people of the city came rejoicing.
verse.verse_68: [Lot] said, "Indeed, these are my guests, so do not shame me.
verse.verse_69: And fear Allah and do not disgrace me."
verse.verse_70: They said, "Have we not forbidden you from [protecting] people?"
verse.verse_71: [Lot] said, "These are my daughters - if you would be doers [of lawful marriage]."
verse.verse_72: By your life, [O Muhammad], indeed they were, in their intoxication, wandering blindly.
verse.verse_73: So the shriek seized them at sunrise.
verse.verse_74: And We made the highest part [of the city] its lowest and rained upon them stones of hard clay.
verse.verse_75: Indeed in that are signs for those who discern.
verse.verse_76: And indeed, those cities are [situated] on an established road.
verse.verse_77: Indeed in that is a sign for the believers.
verse.verse_78: And the companions of the thicket were [also] wrongdoers.
verse.verse_79: So We took retribution from them, and indeed, both [cities] are on a clear highway.
verse.verse_80: And certainly did the companions of Thamud deny the messengers.
verse.verse_81: And We gave them Our signs, but from them they were turning away.
verse.verse_82: And they used to carve from the mountains, houses, feeling secure.
verse.verse_83: But the shriek seized them at early morning.
verse.verse_84: So nothing availed them [from] what they used to earn.
verse.verse_85: And We have not created the heavens and earth and that between them except in truth. And indeed, the Hour is coming; so forgive with gracious forgiveness.
verse.verse_86: Indeed, your Lord - He is the Knowing Creator.
verse.verse_87: And We have certainly given you, [O Muhammad], seven of the often repeated [verses] and the great Qur'an.
verse.verse_88: Do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [certain] categories of the disbelievers, and do not grieve over them. And lower your wing to the believers
verse.verse_89: And say, "Indeed, I am the clear warner" -
verse.verse_90: Just as We had revealed [scriptures] to the separators
verse.verse_91: Who have made the Qur'an into portions.
verse.verse_92: So by your Lord, We will surely question them all
verse.verse_93: About what they used to do.
verse.verse_94: Then declare what you are commanded and turn away from the polytheists.
verse.verse_95: Indeed, We are sufficient for you against the mockers
verse.verse_96: Who make [equal] with Allah another deity. But they are going to know.
verse.verse_97: And We already know that your breast is constrained by what they say.
verse.verse_98: So exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord and be of those who prostrate [to Him].
verse.verse_99: And worship your Lord until there comes to you the certainty (death).
